channel.title: Web Engineering Weekly
channel.description: Weekly digest of web engineering best practices

item.title: Building Resilient Microservices
item.description: Patterns and practices for building microservices that gracefully handle failure, including circuit breakers, bulkheads, and retry strategies.

item.title: Edge Computing with WebAssembly
item.description: How WebAssembly is enabling new edge computing paradigms with near-native performance and universal portability.
